name: Lead Qualify — Webhook → Claude → Airtable → Slack

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "ok": true,
  "score": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Qualification').item.json.score) }},
  "reasoning": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Qualification').item.json.reasoning) }},
  "suggestedAction": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Qualification').item.json.suggestedAction) }},
  "name": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Qualification').item.json.name) }},
  "email": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Qualification').item.json.email) }},
  "company": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Qualification').item.json.company) }},
  "airtableId": {{ JSON.stringify($('Airtable — Append Lead').item.json.id || null) }},
  "slackAlertSent": {{ $('Parse Qualification').item.json.score === 'HOT' }},
  "timing": { "totalMs": {{ Date.now() - ($('Parse Qualification').item.json.startTs || Date.now()) }} }
}
